description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise upholstered in dark brown leather with a tufted seat and backrest. The backrest and armrests are of equal height, creating a boxy, enclosed seating area. The seat features a series of evenly spaced buttons, giving it a classic tufted appearance. The chaise stands on four slender, black metal legs that slightly elevate it above the ground, adding to its contemporary aesthetic. The upholstery appears smooth and glossy, with a subtle sheen that highlights the leather material. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a solid, robust structure suitable for urban environments.
description: A dark brown, leather-upholstered, tufted chaise with boxy armrests and backrest, supported by four slender black legs. The design is modern, minimalist, and features a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted seat and backrest, both armrests, and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid, rectangular armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest and the chaise's overall depth.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, of medium height, and features a tufted design with evenly spaced buttons. It is visually continuous with the armrests, creating a unified, boxy enclosure.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both armrests are present, rectangular, and of equal height to the backrest, positioned on the left and right sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, with a minimalist, modern appearance and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown leather with a tufted pattern on the seat and backrest, featuring regularly spaced buttons for a classic look.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, attached seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, integrated with the tufted backrest and armrests for a seamless, unified appearance.
